headline: Why Coinbase (COIN) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of blockchain infrastructure company Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) jumped 7% in the afternoon session after Bitcoin surged past the $75,000 mark, sparking a broad rally across crypto-related equities.
